description_long: This is a small, single-engine airplane with a high-wing configuration and a tricycle landing gear setup. The fuselage is streamlined and painted primarily white with blue accents along the lower body and nose, and the cockpit features a large, dark-tinted canopy with visible side windows. The wings are straight and mounted above the fuselage, providing good ground clearance and stability. The tail section consists of a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizer, both with clean, angular lines. The landing gear is fixed, with two main wheels under the wings and a single nose wheel. The propeller is mounted at the front of the nose, indicating a piston engine configuration.
description: A small, high-wing, single-engine airplane with a tricycle landing gear and blue-and-white livery. It features a streamlined fuselage, a front-mounted propeller, and a large, enclosed cockpit canopy.
description_view_0: Front view showing the high-mounted straight wings, nose-mounted propeller, and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the streamlined fuselage, cockpit canopy, and fixed landing gear under the wings and nose.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail's conventional design with vertical and horizontal stabilizers, and the main landing gear.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the propeller, cockpit, and landing gear arrangement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel, fixed configuration.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a large canopy and side windows, likely single or dual seat.
